  • Method Details

    • createIssue

      @POST("https://xyz.atlassian.net/rest/api/2/issue/") retrofit2.Call<NewIssueResponse> createIssue(@Body NewIssueRequestModel body)

    • searchIssues

      @POST("https://xyz.atlassian.net/rest/api/2/search/") retrofit2.Call<JiraSearchResponse> searchIssues(@Body JqlQuery jqlQuery)

    • getSprints

      @GET("https://xyz.atlassian.net/rest/agile/1.0/board/{boardId}/sprint/") retrofit2.Call<GetAllSprintsResponse> getSprints(@Path("boardId") int boardId, @Query("state") String state)
